name: Ginger Chocolate Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Whole Blanched Almonds (toasted lightly and chopped coarsely)
recipeInstructions:
1. In the bowl of an electric mixer, fitted with a paddle attachment, blend together the flour, sugar, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, cloves, and cocoa powder until well combined.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together gingerroot, almond extract, and eggs. Add this mixture to the flour mixture, beating until a dough forms. Stir in the almonds.
3. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead several times. Divide into thirds.
4. Working on a large buttered and floured baking sheet, form each piece of dough into a flattish log, approximately 10 inches long by 2 1/2 inches wide. Arrange logs at least 3 inches apart.
5. Bake the logs in the middle of a preheated 350°F oven for 25 minutes. Cool on the baking sheet with the rack underneath for 10 minutes.
6. On a cutting board, cut the logs diagonally into 3/4-inch slices. Arrange biscotti, cut sides down, on the baking sheet.
7. Bake for 5 minutes on each side until crisp and golden brown. Transfer to racks to cool completely.
8. Store cooled biscotti in airtight containers.
Makes: 36 Biscotti
